title: glyceria nervata var. elata
intro: Glyceria nervata var. elata, also known as tall mannagrass, is a type of tall grass with edible rhizomes and a preference for wet environments. The medicinal properties of tall mannagrass include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of consuming tall mannagrass include its potential to help reduce blood pressure, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. Traditionally, tall mannagrass is prepared for consumption as a tea or infused into a liquid extract, and its rhizomes are also used to make a sweet, starchy flour.
